overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character crosses a wet intersection with holographic advertisements, walks along streets lined with palm trees and towering skyscrapers, and passes under elevated highways and pedestrian bridges while surrounded by reflective wet pavement and glowing digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with holographic advertisements and wet reflective streets

events.description: futuristic silver car passes from left to right across the crosswalk in front of the character
character finishes crossing the intersection and enters the street under the elevated highway

agents.ego_description: character walks across the wet intersection, navigating between passing vehicles while heading toward the Fourth Wall building

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver car with angular design drives past from left to right across the crosswalk

entered.detail: tall building with prominent blue neon sign reading FOURTH WALL on the facade
grid pattern of thick yellow painted lines on the wet asphalt creating a reflective surface
towering building covered in massive glowing digital advertisements and neon screens
sleek angular silver vehicle with cyberpunk design crossing the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character begins crossing a wide wet intersection at night, surrounded by towering buildings covered in holographic advertisements. A futuristic silver car passes in front of the camera, its tires splashing on the reflective yellow crosswalk lines. The Fourth Wall building dominates the right side with its bright blue signage, while neon lights reflect off the wet pavement creating a vibrant cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered street under elevated highway with commercial pharmaceutical building

events.description: large dark truck passes by on the street temporarily blocking the view of the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily along the sidewalk under the overpass, passing the pharmaceutical building with its green neon signage

entered.detail: commercial building with green neon sign and circular ventilation structures on the upper facade
bright orange metal barriers separating the sidewalk from the street level
massive elevated concrete highway or train track running above the street creating a covered environment

segments.scene_description: Moving under the elevated highway, the character enters a more sheltered urban canyon. The pharmaceutical building with its distinctive green neon signage stands on the right, while bright orange safety railings line the left side of the walkway. A large truck briefly passes by on the street below, and the environment becomes darker as the overpass blocks the sky above.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial boulevard lined with palm trees and towering holographic advertisements

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the towering skyscrapers covered in digital billboards and illuminated windows
camera returns to horizontal forward-facing position to continue walking along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: character stops to look up at the immense skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements, then continues walking along the palm tree-lined street

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the right side of the sidewalk creating a tropical urban atmosphere
large vertical holographic advertisement featuring a samurai character in purple and pink neon colors
immense futuristic glass towers reaching into the night sky covered in glowing windows and digital displays

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass, the character enters a boulevard lined with palm trees and massive holographic billboards. The camera tilts upward to admire the immense glass skyscrapers piercing the night sky, their facades covered in glowing advertisements including a prominent samurai hologram. The wet pavement continues to reflect the neon lights as the character follows another pedestrian down the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian area with yellow overpass bridge and commercial storefronts

events.description: character passes underneath the bright yellow pedestrian bridge entering a more enclosed covered walkway

agents.ego_description: character walks toward and passes under a yellow pedestrian overpass, continuing down the wet tiled sidewalk past convenience stores

notable_agents.action: person in dark jacket walking ahead under the overpass at a steady pace

entered.detail: bright yellow elevated pedestrian walkway with stairs crossing over the street creating a striking visual element
storefront with illuminated signage and glowing advertisements on the right side of the walkway
reflective tiled sidewalk surface with puddles reflecting the neon lights above

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a distinctive bright yellow pedestrian bridge that spans across the street. After passing underneath it, the environment becomes more enclosed with convenience stores lining the right side. The pavement transitions to reflective tiles that mirror the neon lights, and the orange safety railings recede into the distance as the character continues deeper into the covered urban walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath elevated highway with trees and illuminated shops

agents.ego_description: character continues walking under the covered overpass, passing other pedestrians and illuminated storefronts in the sheltered walkway

entered.detail: large mature trees in concrete planters providing greenery under the concrete overpass structure
shops with bright neon signs and advertisements lining the right side of the covered walkway

segments.scene_description: Walking deeper under the covered highway overpass, the character moves through a sheltered urban corridor lined with trees and glowing storefronts. The environment is darker here, lit primarily by artificial street lamps and shop signs. The wet tiled pavement continues to reflect the ambient light as the character follows the pedestrian ahead, with the massive concrete structure of the overpass looming overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched metropolis that shifts from wide, open intersections into sheltered, claustrophobic urban corridors. It begins with the character crossing a wet intersection where a silver car splashes through reflective yellow crosswalks beneath the bright blue signage of the Fourth Wall building. As the camera moves under an elevated highway, the scene transitions into a darker urban canyon marked by green pharmaceutical signage and orange safety railings before emerging onto a boulevard lined with palm trees and towering skyscrapers featuring a massive samurai hologram. The perspective then passes beneath a bright yellow pedestrian bridge, where the environment becomes more enclosed as the pavement shifts to reflective tiles mirroring the lights of nearby convenience stores. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into a sheltered corridor under the concrete overpass, moving through a dim space lit by artificial street lamps and glowing storefronts.
